title: Reporting Data Migration
scenario: Migration-heavy reporting feature with bounded scope and validation detail.
candidate:
# Reporting Data Migration

## Why

Reporting cannot scale until old rollup data is migrated into the new schema.

## Problem

The reporting system depends on legacy tables that block the next reporting features.

## Goals

- migrate reporting data safely
- preserve reporting correctness during rollout

## Non-Goals

- rebuilding every reporting query in one pass
- changing unrelated admin tooling

## Constraints

- keep the migration reversible
- support a staged rollout

## Solution Shape

Add a schema migration, a backfill job, and a temporary dual-read path.

## Flows

1. Apply the schema migration.
2. Run the backfill job.
3. Validate reports through the dual-read path.

## Data / Interfaces

- reporting schema migration
- backfill job payload
- dual-read reporting contract

## Risks / Open Questions

- backfill duration
- rollback safety
- stale data during the dual-read window

## Rollout

- rehearse on staging
- batch the backfill
- rollback if integrity checks fail

## Verification

- validate migrated row counts
- check reporting data integrity after the backfill
- run focused reporting tests

## Story Breakdown

- add migration
- run backfill
- validate dual-read results
